name: Blueprint
description: Deep navy background, white and electric blue, IBM Plex Mono font. Technical drawing/engineering aesthetic with grid marks and spec callouts.

typography.note: Decorate scenes with dashed border lines (border:2px dashed #4d6a99), corner bracket marks, and dimension callouts. Labels in all-caps with letter-spacing:4px feel like spec annotations. Grid bg: repeating-linear-gradient lines at ~60px spacing in rgba(77,106,153,0.15).

css.hed: font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-weight:700; font-size:100px; color:#e8f0ff; line-height:1.05;
css.sub: font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-weight:400; font-size:46px; color:#4d6a99;
css.capText: font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:32px; font-weight:400; color:#4da6ff; text-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(77,166,255,0.5); padding:0 140px; line-height:1.4;

specBox.description: The defining Blueprint visual — a dashed-border box with the surface color background, wrapping the main content. Looks like a spec sheet or technical drawing callout. REQUIRED on title-card; use on any scene where content needs framing.
specBox.annotation: Pair with a '// COMMENT LABEL' line above the box in muted color (#4d6a99, font-size:28px, letter-spacing:4px) for the full spec-sheet look.

gridBackground.description: Blueprint grid overlay on every scene-bg. Subtle repeating lines at 60px spacing.

cornerBrackets.description: Accent-colored corner L-brackets in scene corners for a technical drawing feel.

leftBar.description: A vertical 4px accent bar on the left edge — used on kinetic-text and quote scenes.

titleCardTemplate.note: Blueprint title-card MUST use the spec-box pattern. Structure: annotation label above box → dashed box with surface bg wrapping headline + sub.
titleCardTemplate.html:
// YOUR LABEL

Your headline here.

Supporting line.
